description: Fitz and Mack, working in the lab, finally make a breakthrough as Fitz remembers an old design that could neutralize Creel's powers. Mack's patience and encouragement pay off, deepening their budding partnership. Fitz begins to regain some confidence, with Mack keeping him focused and on track.

transcript.line: It's all about the... the resonant. I didn't solve this today.
What... what... what... what is this? What, is this some kind of sonic thing, like the cloaking device?

Look, forget about the cloaking device, all right? No one's blaming you for that. Right now we just got to focus on taking down Creel. Whoa! Whoa! Calm the hell down! Hey, beat it! You're pissing him off.
Look, I didn't solve this today!
Yeah, I know. You said that already!
Wait. Are you saying you didn't solve this today. You solved this before?
Y-you're looking for an old design?
All right. Okay. All right. I'm with you. Yeah. I'm with you, turbo. All right.
No. No. No. Um... go back one. Go back one. Yeah. Yeah!
